message:
🌱 Add ollama: Integrated AMD GPU support mission (#979)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-2637-integrated-amd-gpu-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: Integrated AMD GPU support",
+    "description": "Integrated AMD GPU support. Requested by 57+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Ollama version:\n```bash\nollama version\n```\nThis feature addresses AMD integrated GPU (iGPU) support for APUs like AMD 5800U and 7840U."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review AMD iGPU requirements",
+        "description": "AMD integrated GPUs use system RAM via GTT/GART for VRAM. Key considerations:\n- iGPUs have limited dedicated VRAM (typically 512MB-8GB configurable in BIOS)\n- Additional system RAM is available via GTT memory mapping\n- ROCm drivers must be installed\n- Some iGPUs may need the `HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION` environment variable"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure Ollama for AMD iGPU",
+        "description": "For Docker with AMD iGPU:\n```yaml\nservices:\n  ollama:\n    image: ollama/ollama:rocm\n    container_name: ollama\n    volumes:\n      - ollama_data:/root/.ollama\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    devices:\n      - /dev/dri\n      - /dev/kfd\n    security_opt:\n      - \"seccomp:unconfined\"\n    group_add:\n      - video\n    environment:\n      - HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION=9.0.0\n```\nAdjust `HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION` for your specific GPU architecture."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify iGPU acceleration works",
+        "description": "Run a model and verify GPU acceleration is active:\n```bash\nollama run llama3 \"Hello!\" --verbose\n```\nCheck the Ollama server logs for GPU detection messages. If the iGPU is not detected, try setting `HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION` to match your GPU architecture."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "AMD integrated GPU support was added to Ollama via ROCm. iGPUs use GTT/GART to access system RAM as VRAM. Users may need to set HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION and use the ROCm Docker image.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "ollama",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+  },
